theory.canonical_statement: ID 410 establishes the quantum tunneling interface required for the "Transcendence" of energy across the codimension 2 horizon. While classical particles are reflected by the SS304L torus boundary, the TZP state allows for a non zero tunneling probability through the Vbarrier potential. This operator governs the transition of vacuum flux from the sub Planckian "Static Bubble" into the macroscopic "Active Manifold." By modulating the effective mass meff via the 17.2 kHz acoustic carrier, the system can "thin" the barrier, allowing for a controlled helicity cascade into the superconducting core. Dynamic Barrier: Vbarrier is a time dependent potential that oscillates in phase with the up refresh rate [ID 407]. Nodal Pinning: Tunneling is localized at the 153,600 nodes of the DAANSsphere to prevent field leakage.
